ýáäý×ÉýáĽŰÂÇ ÝĹťýĄÇÝöäŰáłý×äýŤîÝüČ ÝÖłÝÄśýŁ┤ýžÇýŚÉýäť Ű░░ý╣śýőĄÝľëÝÖśŕ▓Ż ýćîýŐĄÝîîýŁ╝ýŁä ŰőĄýÜ┤ Ű░ŤýĽä ýĽĽýÂĽýŁä ÝĺÇŕ│á, m2 ýŁ┤Ýü┤ŰŽŻýŐĄŕ░Ç ýäĄý╣śŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄŰŐö ŕ░ÇýáĽÝĽśýŚÉ ýäĄŰ¬ůÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ű░░ý╣śýőĄÝľëÝÖśŕ▓Ż ýśłýáť ýäĄý╣śŰ▓Ľ

ýäĄý╣ś ýłťýäť

ŕŞ░Ű│Şýłťýäť

ýáäý×ÉýáĽŰÂÇ ÝĹťýĄÇÝöäŰáłý×äýŤîÝüČ ÝÖłÝÄśýŁ┤ýžÇýŚÉýäť Ű░░ý╣śýőĄÝľëÝÖśŕ▓Ż ýćîýŐĄÝîîýŁ╝ýŁä ŰőĄýÜ┤ Ű░ŤýĽä ýĽĽýÂĽýŁä ÝĺÇŕ│á, m2 ýŁ┤Ýü┤ŰŽŻýŐĄŕ░Ç ýäĄý╣śŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄŰŐö ŕ░ÇýáĽÝĽśýŚÉ ýäĄŰ¬ůÝĽťŰőĄ.

ýőĄÝľëÝÖśŕ▓Ż ýśłýáť ŰőĄýÜ┤ŰíťŰôť

  1. Package ExplorerýŚÉýäť ýśĄŰąŞý¬Ż ŰžłýÜ░ýŐĄŰą╝ Ýü┤ŰŽşÝĽśýŚČ ýćîýŐĄŰą╝ ý×äÝĆČÝŐŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

  1. General>Existing Projects into WorkspaceŰą╝ ýäáÝâŁÝĽśýŚČ ýĽĽýÂĽýŁä ÝĺÇýľ┤ŰćôýŁÇ ÝĆ┤ŰŹöŰą╝ ýäáÝâŁÝĽťŰőĄ.

  1. Ű░░ý╣śýőĄÝľëýśłýáťýŚÉýäťŰŐö HSQL DBŰą╝ ýáťŕ│ÁÝĽśŕ│á ý×łýť╝Űę░ runHsqlDB.cmd ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁä ýőĄÝľëýőťý╝ť DBŰą╝ ŕŞ░ŰĆÖýőťÝéĘŰőĄ.
  • egovframework.brte.example\database\db ÝĆ┤ŰŹöýŚÉýäť ýśĄŰąŞý¬Ż ŰžłýÜ░ýŐĄŰą╝ Ýü┤ŰŽşÝĽśýŚČ Path Tools>Commands Line ShellýŁä ýäáÝâŁÝĽťŰőĄ.

  • Ű¬ůŰá╣ÝöäŰíČÝöäÝŐŞ ý░ŻýŚÉ runHsqlDBŰą╝ ý×ůŰáąÝĽśýŚČ runHsqlDB.cmd ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁä ýőĄÝľëýőťÝéĘŰőĄ.

Ôťö Path Tools>Commands Line ShellýŁä ýäáÝâŁÝĽá ýłś ýŚćýŁä ŕ▓ŻýÜ░, ÝĽ┤Űő╣ ÝöäŰíťýáŁÝŐŞýŁś ÝĆ┤ŰŹöýŚÉýäť \database\dbýĽäŰ×śýŚÉ ý×łŰŐö runHsqlDB ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁä Ýü┤ŰŽşÝĽťŰőĄ.

HSQLýÖŞ DB ýŚ░ŕ▓░ýłťýäť

  1. ý×äÝĆČÝŐŞ ŰÉť ýćîýŐĄýŚÉýäť DBýáĽŰ│┤Űą╝ ýĽîŰž×ŕ▓î Ű░öŕ┐öýĄÇŰőĄ. ýťäý╣ś:src/test/resources/egovframework/batch/properties/globals.properties

  1. src/script ÝĆ┤ŰŹöýŁś ÝĽ┤Űő╣ DBýŁś script ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁä ý░Şŕ│áÝĽśýŚČ ÝůîýŁ┤ŰŞöýŁä ýâŁýä▒ÝĽśŕ│á ŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░Űą╝ ýÂöŕ░ÇÝĽťŰőĄ.

DB ýŚ░ŕ▓░ýőť ýú╝ýŁśýéČÝĽş

altibaseŰéś tibero ýŚ░ŕ▓░ýőťýŚÉŰŐö ýĽäŰ×śýŁś ýäĄýáĽýŁ┤ ýÂöŕ░ÇŰíť ÝĽäýÜöÝĽśŰőĄ.

Ôťö altibaseŰéś tibero ýŚ░ŕ▓░ýőťýŚÉŰŐö ýĽäŰ×śýŁś ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁś jobRepository ýŚÉ databaseTypeýť╝Űíť oracleŰíť ýÂöŕ░Ç ýäĄýáĽýŁä ÝĽ┤ýĽ╝ ÝĽťŰőĄ.

  • batch-runner-context.xml
  • group-job-launcher-context.xml
  • simple-job-launcher-context.xml
  • syncÔÇôjob-launcher-context.xml
<bean id="jobRepository" class="org.springframework.batch.core.repository.support.JobRepositoryFactoryBean"
		p:dataSource-ref="dataSource" p:databaseType="oracle" p:transactionManager-ref="transactionManager" p:lobHandler-ref="lobHandler"/>

Ôťö JdbcPagingItemReaderýŁś queryProviderýŚÉ databaseTypeýť╝Űíť oracleŰíť ýÂöŕ░Ç ýäĄýáĽýŁä ÝĽ┤ýĽ╝ ÝĽťŰőĄ.

<bean id="itemReader" class="org.springframework.batch.item.database.JdbcPagingItemReader" scope="step">
	<property name="dataSource" ref="dataSource" />
	<property name="rowMapper">
		<bean class="egovframework.brte.sample.common.domain.trade.CustomerCreditRowMapper" />
	</property>
       <property name="queryProvider">
		<bean class="org.springframework.batch.item.database.support.SqlPagingQueryProviderFactoryBean">
			<property name="dataSource" ref="dataSource"/>
			<property name="databaseType" value="oracle"/>
			<property name="sortKey" value="ID" />
			<!-- Intentionally put sort key second in the query list as a test -->
			<property name="selectClause" value="select NAME, ID, CREDIT" />
			<property name="fromClause" value="FROM CUSTOMER" />
               </bean>
        </property>
	<property name="pageSize" value="2" />

Ôťö JDBCPagingtEST ÝĽá ŕ▓ŻýÜ░ altibase Ű▓äýáäýŁ┤ 6.1.1ýŁ╝ŕ▓ŻýÜ░ýŚÉŰžî ýáĽýâüŰĆÖý×ĹÝĽęŰőłŰőĄ.

45 - ŰĆÖŕŞ░/Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ ý▓śŰŽČ ýśłýáť

ýŁ╝ŕ┤ä(Ű░░ý╣ś)ý▓śŰŽČ ý×ĹýŚů ýłśÝľë ýőť, ý×ĹýŚůý▓śŰŽČŕ░Ç ýóůŰúîŰÉá ŰĽîŕ╣îýžÇ ŰîÇŕŞ░ÝĽśŰŐö ŰĆÖŕŞ░Ű░ęýőŁ ý▓śŰŽČýÖÇ ý×ĹýŚůý▓śŰŽČýŁś ýóůŰúîŰą╝ CallbackŰžĄý╗ĄŰőłýŽśýŁä ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽśýŚČ ýáäŰőČŰ░ŤŰŐö Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ý▓śŰŽČýŚÉ ŰîÇÝĽť ýśłýáťŰą╝ Ű│┤ýŚČýĄÇŰőĄ.

ŰĆÖŕŞ░/Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ ý▓śŰŽČ ýśłýáť

ŕ░ťýÜö

ýŁ╝ŕ┤ä(Ű░░ý╣ś)ý▓śŰŽČ ý×ĹýŚů ýłśÝľë ýőť, ý×ĹýŚůý▓śŰŽČŕ░Ç ýóůŰúîŰÉá ŰĽîŕ╣îýžÇ ŰîÇŕŞ░ÝĽśŰŐö ŰĆÖŕŞ░Ű░ęýőŁ ý▓śŰŽČýÖÇ ý×ĹýŚůý▓śŰŽČýŁś ýóůŰúîŰą╝ CallbackŰžĄý╗ĄŰőłýŽśýŁä ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽśýŚČ ýáäŰőČŰ░ŤŰŐö Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ý▓śŰŽČýŚÉ ŰîÇÝĽť ýśłýáťŰą╝ Ű│┤ýŚČýĄÇŰőĄ.

ýäĄŰ¬ů

ýäĄýáĽ

Launcher ýäĄýáĽ

ŰĆÖŕŞ░/Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ ý▓śŰŽČ ýśłýáťýŁś Launcher ýäĄýáĽÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ skipSample-job-launcher-context.xml ýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Job ýłśÝľëýőť, ŰĆÖŕŞ░ýÖÇ Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ Ű░ęýőŁýť╝Űíť ŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░Űą╝ ý▓śŰŽČÝĽá ýłś ý×łýť╝Űę░, ýŁ┤ ýśłýáťýŚÉýäťŰŐö ŰĆÖŕŞ░ ý▓śŰŽČŕ░Ç ŕŞ░Ű│Şŕ░ĺýť╝Űíť ýäĄýáĽŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ. ýäĄýáĽýťäý╣śŰŐö Launcher ýäĄýáĽÝîîýŁ╝ýŁś jobLauncher Ű╣łýŚÉýäť taskExecutor ÝöäŰíťÝŹ╝Ýő░ýŁ┤Űę░, ý░Şýí░ÝĽśŰŐö ŕ░ĺýť╝Űíť ŰőĄýŁî ŰĹÉ ŕ░ÇýžÇŰą╝ ýäĄýáĽÝĽá ýłś ý×łŰőĄ.

  • sync : ŰĆÖŕŞ░ý▓śŰŽČýőť ýéČýÜęÝĽá Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄ ýäĄýáĽ
  • async : Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ý▓śŰŽČýőť ýéČýÜęÝĽá Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄ ýäĄýáĽ
<bean id="jobLauncher" class="org.springframework.batch.core.launch.support.SimpleJobLauncher">
	<property name="jobRepository" ref="jobRepository" />
	<property name="taskExecutor" ref="sync"/>  <!-- Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ýőť ref="async" -->
</bean>

<!-- ŰĆÖŕŞ░ ý▓śŰŽČýőť  sync -->
<bean id="sync" class="org.springframework.core.task.SyncTaskExecutor" />

<!-- Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░  ý▓śŰŽČýőť async -->
<bean id="async" class="org.springframework.core.task.SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor" />

Job ýäĄýáĽ

ŰĆÖŕŞ░/Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ ý▓śŰŽČ ýśłýáťýŁś Job ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ delegatingJob.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

ŰĆÖŕŞ░/Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ ý▓śŰŽČ ýśłýáťŰą╝ ýťäÝĽ┤ ÝŐ╣Ű│äÝ×ł JobýŁä ýäĄýáĽÝĽśŰŐö Űé┤ýÜęýŁÇ ýŚćŰőĄ. ýŁ┤ ýśłýáťýŚÉýäť ýáťŕ│ÁÝĽśŰŐö JobýŁś ýâüýäŞ Űé┤ýÜęýŁÇ ŕŞ░ýí┤ ýŚůŰČ┤ ý×ČýéČýÜę ýśłýáťýŁś Job ýäĄýáĽŕ│╝ ŕ░Öýť╝Ű»ÇŰíť ýŁ┤Űą╝ ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.

<job id="delegateJob" xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/batch">
	<step id="delegateStep1">
		<tasklet>
			<chunk reader="reader" writer="writer" commit-interval="3"/>
		</tasklet>
	</step>
</job>

<bean id="reader" class="org.springframework.batch.item.adapter.ItemReaderAdapter">
	<property name="targetObject" ref="delegateObject" />
	<property name="targetMethod" value="getData" />
</bean>

<bean id="writer" class="org.springframework.batch.item.adapter.PropertyExtractingDelegatingItemWriter">
	<property name="targetObject" ref="delegateObject" />
	<property name="targetMethod" value="processPerson" />
	<property name="fieldsUsedAsTargetMethodArguments">
		<list>
			<value>firstName</value>
			<value>address.city</value>
		</list>
	</property>
</bean>

<bean id="delegateObject" class="egovframework.brte.sample.common.domain.person.PersonService" />

Async Item Processor ŕÁČýä▒

Item ProcessorŰą╝ Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ ý▓śŰŽČÝĽśŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽ┤ Spring BatchýŚÉýäť AsyncItemProcessor ýäťŰ╣äŰą╝ ýžÇýŤÉÝĽťŰőĄ.
AsyncItemProcessor ýäťŰ╣äýŐĄŰą╝ ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽť ýäĄýáĽýŁÇ ýĽäŰ×śýÖÇ ŕ░ÖŰőĄ.

<task:executor id="taskExecutor" pool-size="100"/>
<bean id="itemProcessorAsync" class="org.springframework.batch.integration.async.AsyncItemProcessor">
	<!-- delegateÝćÁÝĽ┤ ýőĄýáť ŰĆÖý×Ĺ ÝĽá Item ProcessorŰą╝ ýäĄýáĽÝĽťŰőĄ. -->
	<property name="delegate" ref="fixedLengthToFixedLengthJob.fixedLengthToFixedLengthStep.itemProcessor"/>
	<!-- ExecutorŰą╝ ýäĄýáĽÝĽťŰőĄ. -->	
	<property name="taskExecutor" ref="taskExecutor" />
</bean>

JunitTest ŕÁČýä▒ Ű░Ć ýłśÝľë

JunitTest ŕÁČýä▒

sync-job-launcher-contextýäĄýáĽŕ│╝ delegatingJobýäĄýáĽýť╝Űíť ŕÁČýä▒ŰÉť Junit TestŰą╝ ýłśÝľëÝĽťŰőĄ. ýŁ┤ ŰĽî Ű░░ý╣śŕ░Ç ýłśÝľëŰÉśŕ│á, ŕ┤ÇŰáĘŰÉť Űé┤ýÜęýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽá ýłś ý×łŰőĄ.

Ôťö JunitTest Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄýŁś ŕÁČýí░ŰŐö Ű░░ý╣śýőĄÝľëÝÖśŕ▓Ż ýśłýáť Junit Test ýäĄŰ¬ůýŁä ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.
Ôťö assertEquals(ÔÇťCOMPLETEDÔÇŁ, jobExecution.getExitStatus().getExitCode()) : Ű░░ý╣śýłśÝľëŕ▓░ŕ│╝ŕ░Ç COMPLETED ýŁŞýžÇ ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.
Ôťö Thread.sleep(4000) : Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░Űíť Ű░░ý╣śŰą╝ ýłśÝľë ýőť, DBýŚÉ Ű░░ý╣śýâüÝâť(UNKNOWN)Űą╝ ýůőÝîůÝĽśŕ│á DBýŚ░ŕ▓░ýŁ┤ ýóůŰúîŰÉśýľ┤ JobýŁ┤ ýáĽýâüýáüýť╝Űíť ýłśÝľëŰÉśŰŹöŰŁ╝ŰĆä ýóůŰúîýâüÝâť(COMPLETED,FAILED)Űą╝ ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽá ýłś ýŚćŰőĄ. ýśłýáťýŚÉýäťŰŐö Jobŕ▓░ŕ│╝Űą╝ ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽśŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽ┤ ThreadŰą╝ ýáüýáĽýőťŕ░äŰĆÖýĽł ýáĽýžÇýőťý╝ť ýŁŞýťäýáüýť╝Űíť ýóůŰúîýâüÝâťŰą╝ ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽśŰĆäŰíŁ ýäĄýáĽÝĽśýśÇŰőĄ.

@ContextConfiguration(locations = { "/egovframework/batch/sync-job-launcher-context.xml", 
			"/egovframework/batch/jobs/delegatingJob.xml", 
			"/egovframework/batch/job-runner-context.xml" })
public class EgovSyncDelegatingJobFunctionalTests {
	...
	@Test
	public void testLaunchJob() throws Exception {
		JobExecution jobExecution=null;
		try{
			   jobExecution =jobLauncherTestUtils.launchJob();
			   //Async Űíť ýłśÝľëŰÉśŰŐö ŕ▓ŻýÜ░ Exit StatusŰŐö UNKNOWNýť╝Űíť ýäĄýáĽ ŰÉĘ
			   assertEquals("UNKNOWN", jobExecution.getExitStatus().getExitCode());
			   Thread.sleep(4000); 
 
		   }catch (InterruptedException ie){
			   ie.printStackTrace();
		   }
		 assertTrue(personService.getReturnedCount() > 0);
		 assertEquals(personService.getReturnedCount(), personService.getReceivedCount()) ;
		 assertEquals("COMPLETED", jobExecution.getExitStatus().getExitCode());	
	}
}

JunitTest ýłśÝľë

AsyncItemWriter

ýłśÝľëŰ░ęŰ▓ĽýŁÇ JunitTest ýőĄÝľëýŁä ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.

ý░Şŕ│áý×ÉŰúî

  • ŰĆÖŕŞ░/Ű╣äŰĆÖŕŞ░ ýśłýáť
  • JobLauncher

46 - ŰőĘýłťý▓śŰŽČ(Tasklet) ýśłýáť

Ű░░ý╣ś ýłśÝľë ýőť, JobýŁś ýőĄÝľëýĄĹ itemReaderýÖÇ ItemWriter Űô▒ýŁś ýŁŞÝä░ÝÄśýŁ┤ýŐĄ ýéČýÜęýŁ┤ ÝĽäýÜöýŚćŰŐö ŰőĘýłťý▓śŰŽČŰÉśŰŐö ý×ĹýŚů(ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁ┤ŰĆÖ Űô▒)ýŁä Ű│┤ýŚČýú╝ŰŐö ýśłýáťýŁ┤ŰőĄ.

ŰőĘýłťý▓śŰŽČ(Tasklet) ýśłýáť

ŕ░ťýÜö

Ű░░ý╣ś ýłśÝľë ýőť, JobýŁś ýőĄÝľëýĄĹ itemReaderýÖÇ ItemWriter Űô▒ýŁś ýŁŞÝä░ÝÄśýŁ┤ýŐĄ ýéČýÜęýŁ┤ ÝĽäýÜöýŚćŰŐö ŰőĘýłťý▓śŰŽČŰÉśŰŐö ý×ĹýŚů(ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁ┤ŰĆÖ Űô▒)ýŁä Ű│┤ýŚČýú╝ŰŐö ýśłýáťýŁ┤ŰőĄ.

ýäĄŰ¬ů

ýäĄýáĽ

Job ýäĄýáĽ

ŰőĘýłťý▓śŰŽČ(Tasklet) ýśłýáťýŁś Job ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ taskletJob.xml ýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Job ýŁś ŕÁČýä▒ýŁä Ű│┤Űę┤ ŰőĄŰąŞ Jobŕ│╝ ŰőČŰŽČ Chunk ýäĄýáĽýŁ┤ ýŚćŕ│á, <tasklet>ýŚÉýäť ý░Şýí░ÝĽśŰŐö adapter Ű╣łýŚÉýäť jobParametersŰíť ýäĄýáĽŰÉť ŕ░ĺýŁä targetObject ÝöäŰíťÝŹ╝Ýő░ ŕ░ĺýť╝Űíť Űäśŕ▓Ęýú╝ŰŐö ŕ▓âýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽá ýłś ý×łŰőĄ.

<job id="loopJob" xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/batch">
	<step id="step1">
		<tasklet ref="adapter">
			<transaction-attributes propagation="REQUIRED"/>
		</tasklet>
	</step>
</job>
 
<bean id="adapter" class="org.springframework.batch.core.step.tasklet.MethodInvokingTaskletAdapter">
	<property name="targetObject" ref="value" />
	<property name="targetMethod" value="execute" />
</bean>
 
<bean id="value" class="egovframework.brte.sample.example.test.EgovTaskletJobFunctionalTests$TestBean" scope="step">
	<property name="value" value="#{jobParameters[value]}" />
</bean>

JunitTest ŕÁČýä▒ Ű░Ć ýłśÝľë

JunitTest ŕÁČýä▒

taskletJob ýäĄýáĽŕ│╝ ŕ┤ÇŰáĘ Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄŰôĄŰíť Junit TestŰą╝ ýłśÝľëÝĽťŰőĄ. ýŁ┤ ŰĽî Ű░░ý╣śŕ░Ç ýłśÝľëŰÉśŕ│á, ŕ┤ÇŰáĘŰÉť Űé┤ýÜęýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽá ýłś ý×łŰőĄ.

Ôťö JunitTest Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄýŁś ŕÁČýí░ŰŐö Ű░░ý╣śýőĄÝľëÝÖśŕ▓Ż ýśłýáť Junit Test ýäĄŰ¬ůýŁä ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.
Ôťö assertEquals(BatchStatus.COMPLETED, jobExecution.getStatus()): Ű░░ý╣śýłśÝľëŕ▓░ŕ│╝ŕ░Ç COMPLETED ýŁŞýžÇ ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.
Ôťö TestBean Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄýŁś assertEquals(ÔÇťfooÔÇŁ, value) : jobParameterýŚÉ value Űíť ýáÇý×ąÝĽť ÔÇťfooÔÇŁ ýÖÇ ŰČŞý×ÉýŚ┤ ÔÇťfooÔÇŁ ŕ░Ç ŕ░ÖýŁÇýžÇ ÝîÉŰőĘÝĽťŰőĄ. (jobParameterŰíť Űäúýľ┤ýĄÇ ŕ░ĺýŁ┤ ýéČýÜęý×Éŕ░Ç ýžÇýáĽÝĽť ŕ░ĺŕ│╝ ŕ░ÖýŁÇýžÇ ŰőĘýłťŰ╣äŕÁÉ)

@ContextConfiguration(locations = { "/egovframework/batch/simple-job-launcher-context.xml", 
			"/egovframework/batch/jobs/taskletJob.xml",
			"/egovframework/batch/job-runner-context.xml" })
public class EgovTaskletJobFunctionalTests {
	...
	@Test
	public void testLaunchJob() throws Exception {
		JobExecution jobExecution = jobLauncherTestUtils.launchJob(new JobParametersBuilder().addString("value", "foo")
					.addParameter( "timestamp", new JobParameter(new Date().getTime())).toJobParameters());
		assertEquals(BatchStatus.COMPLETED, jobExecution.getStatus());
	}
	public static class TestBean {
		//String value
		private String value;
 
       		public void setValue(String value) {
			this.value = value;
		}
 
		public void execute() {
			assertEquals("foo", value);
		}
	}
}

JunitTest ýłśÝľë

ýłśÝľëŰ░ęŰ▓ĽýŁÇ JunitTest ýőĄÝľëýŁä ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.

ý░Şŕ│áý×ÉŰíť

  • TaskletStep

47 -

Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ýŁä ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽť EgovCommandLineRunner ýśłýáť

ŕ░ťýÜö

CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ÝöäŰíťýáŁÝŐŞŰą╝ ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽśýŚČ EgovCommandLineRunnerýŁś ýéČýÜęŰ▓ĽýŁä Ű│┤ýŚČýú╝ŰŐö ýśłýáťýŁ┤ŰőĄ.

ýäĄŰ¬ů

ýäĄýáĽ

CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ÝöäŰíťýáŁÝŐŞ ýâŁýä▒

ýĽäŰ×śŰą╝ ý░Şŕ│áÝĽśýŚČ File(SAM) / DB ÝâÇý×ůýŁś CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ÝöäŰíťýáŁÝŐŞ Űą╝ ýâŁýä▒ÝĽťŰőĄ.

  1. File(SAM)ÝâÇý×ů
  2. DBÝâÇý×ů

CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýáäý▓┤ ýäĄýáĽ

CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ context-commandline.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýőĄÝľëýŚÉ ÝĽäýÜöÝĽť xml ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.
Ôťö Job ŕ┤ÇŰáĘ xmlýŁś ŕ▓ŻýÜ░ ÝŐ╣ýáĽ ÝĆ┤ŰŹö Ű░ĹýŚÉ JobŰő╣ ÝĽśŰéśýŁś xml ÝîîýŁ╝Űíť ŰéśŰłäýľ┤ýáŞ ý×łŰőĄ.

    <import resource="classpath:/egovframework/batch/context-batch-datasource.xml" />
	<import resource="classpath:/egovframework/batch/context-batch-job-launcher.xml" />
	<import resource="classpath:/egovframework/batch/context-batch-sqlmap.xml" />
	<import resource="classpath:/egovframework/batch/job/*.xml" />

CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ context-batch-datasource.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö datasource ŕ┤ÇŰáĘ ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.

    <bean id="egov.propertyConfigurer" class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.PropertyPlaceholderConfigurer">
        <property name="locations">
            <list>
                <value>classpath:/egovframework/batch/properties/globals.properties</value>
            </list>
        </property>
    </bean>
 
	...
	DBMSŰ│ä ýäĄýáĽ
         ...
    <bean id="transactionManager" class="org.springframework.jdbc.datasource.DataSourceTransactionManager" lazy-init="true">
		<property name="dataSource" ref="egov.dataSource" />
	</bean>
 
	<bean id="lobHandler" class="org.springframework.jdbc.support.lob.DefaultLobHandler"/>
 
	<bean id="customEditorConfigurer" class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.CustomEditorConfigurer">
		<property name="customEditors">
			<map>
				<entry key="int[]" value="org.springframework.batch.support.IntArrayPropertyEditor" />
			</map>
		</property>
	</bean>

CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ context-batch-job-launcher.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö JobLauncher, JobOperator, JobRepository, JobRegistry, JobExplorer ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.

    <bean id="jobLauncher"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.launch.support.SimpleJobLauncher">
		<property name="jobRepository" ref="jobRepository" />
	</bean>
 
	<bean class="org.springframework.batch.core.configuration.support.JobRegistryBeanPostProcessor">
		<property name="jobRegistry" ref="jobRegistry"/>
	</bean>
 
	<bean id="jobRepository"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.repository.support.JobRepositoryFactoryBean"
		p:dataSource-ref="egov.dataSource" p:transactionManager-ref="transactionManager" p:lobHandler-ref="lobHandler"/>
 
	<bean id="jobOperator"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.launch.support.SimpleJobOperator"
		p:jobLauncher-ref="jobLauncher" p:jobExplorer-ref="jobExplorer"
		p:jobRepository-ref="jobRepository" p:jobRegistry-ref="jobRegistry" />
 
	<bean id="jobExplorer"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.explore.support.JobExplorerFactoryBean"
		p:dataSource-ref="egov.dataSource" />
 
	<bean id="jobRegistry"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.configuration.support.MapJobRegistry" />

CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ context-batch-sqlmap.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö SQLMapClient ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.

    <bean id="sqlMapClient" class="org.springframework.orm.ibatis.SqlMapClientFactoryBean">
		<property name="dataSource" ref="egov.dataSource" />
		<property name="configLocation" value="classpath:/egovframework/sqlmap/brte/sql-map-config.xml" />	
	</bean>

EgovCommandLineJobRunner ŕÁČýä▒ Ű░Ć ýłśÝľë

EgovCommandLineJobRunner ŕÁČýä▒

EgovCommandLineJobRunnerŰŐö CommandLine ýâüýŚÉýäť ýőĄÝľëŰÉśýľ┤ýĽ╝ ÝĽśŕŞ░ ŰĽîŰČŞýŚÉ main() ŰęöýćîŰôťŰą╝ ýžÇŰőłŕ│á ý×łŰőĄ. ýŁ┤ ŰęöýćîŰôť ýĽłýŚÉýäť EgovCommandLineRunnerŰą╝ ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽśýŚČ JobýŁä ýőĄÝľëÝĽťŰőĄ.

CommandLineýâüýŚÉýäť ýőĄÝľëÝĽśŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽ┤ýäťŰŐö jobPathýÖÇ jobIdentifierýŁä ýŁŞýłśŰíť Ű░ŤýĽäýĽ╝ ÝĽśŰę░, ýÂöŕ░Çýáüýť╝Űíť jobParameterŰą╝ ýŁŞýłśŰíť ýáäŰőČ Ű░ŤýĽäýäť ýőĄÝľë ŕ░ÇŰŐąÝĽśŰőĄ.

Ôťö EgovCommandLineJobRunnerýŁś main() ŰęöýćîŰôťŰé┤ýŚÉŰŐö main() ŰęöýćîŰôťŕ░Ç Ű░ŤýĽäŰôĄýŁŞ argsýŚÉýäť jobPath, jobIdentifier, jobParameters, optionýŁä ŰÂäŰŽČÝĽśŰŐö ŕŞ░ŰŐąýŁ┤ ŕÁČÝśäŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ

	public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
		EgovCommandLineRunner command = new EgovCommandLineRunner();
 
                ... ýĄĹŰ×Á ...
 
        if (jobPath == null || jobIdentifier == null) {
			String message = "At least 2 arguments are required: JobPath and jobIdentifier.";
			logger.error(message);
			command.setMessage(message);
			command.exit(1);
		}
 
		String[] parameters = params.toArray(new String[params.size()]);
 
		int result = command.start(jobPath, jobIdentifier, parameters, opts);
		command.exit(result);
    }

EgovCommandLineJobRunner ýłśÝľë

  1. CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ÝöäŰíťýáŁÝŐŞŰą╝ ýäáÝâŁÝĽťŰőĄ.

  1. ŰęöŰë┤ ÝĹťýőťýĄäýŚÉýäť Run > Run Configuration ýŁä ýäáÝâŁÝĽťŰőĄ.

  1. Argument ÝâşýŁä ýäáÝâŁÝĽśýŚČ ýĽäŰ×śýÖÇ ŕ░ÖýŁ┤ jobPathýÖÇ jobIdentifierŰą╝ ý×ůŰáąÝĽťŰőĄ. jobIdentifier ŰĺĄýŚÉ ŰÂÖýŁÇ ArgumentŰŐö Job ParameterŰíť ýéČýÜęŰÉśŰę░, ýŚČŰčČ ŕ░ťýŁś ArgumentŰą╝ ŰäúýŁä ýłś ý×łŰőĄ.

/egovframework/batch/context-commandline.xml delimitedToDelimitedJob inputFile=egovframework/batch/data/inputs/csvData.csv

Ôťö ýťä ÝÖöŰę┤ý▓śŰč╝ ArgumentýÖÇ Argument ýéČýŁ┤ŰŐö Ű░śŰôťýőť ýŐĄÝÄśýŁ┤ýŐĄŰíť ŕÁČŰÂäÝĽ┤ýĽ╝ ÝĽťŰőĄ.
Ôťö CommandLine Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ÝöäŰíťýáŁÝŐŞýŚÉýäť ŕŞ░Ű│Şýáüýť╝Űíť ýáťŕ│ÁÝĽśŰŐö jobIdentifier(JobýŁś ýŁ┤ŰŽä)ŰŐö File(SAM) ÝâÇý×ůýŚÉýäť ýáťŕ│ÁÝĽśŰŐö JobýŁś ýóůŰąś ýÖÇ DB ÝâÇý×ůýŚÉýäť ýáťŕ│ÁÝĽśŰŐö JobýŁś ýóůŰąś Űą╝ ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.

  1. ŰęöŰë┤ ÝĹťýőťýĄäýŚÉýäť Run > Run ýŁä ýäáÝâŁÝĽťŰőĄ.

ŕ▓░ŕ│╝ ÝÖĽýŁŞ

Console ý░ŻýŚÉýäť JobýŁ┤ ýőĄÝľëŰÉśýľ┤ CompletedŰíť ýóůŰúîŰÉśýŚłýŁîýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

48 -

Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ýŁä ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽť EgovSchedulerRunner ýśłýáť

ŕ░ťýÜö

Scheduler ŕŞ░Ű░śýŁś Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ÝöäŰíťýáŁÝŐŞŰą╝ ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽśýŚČ EgovSchedulerRunnerýŁś ýéČýÜęŰ▓ĽýŁä Ű│┤ýŚČýú╝ŰŐö ýśłýáťýŁ┤ŰőĄ.

ýäĄŰ¬ů

ýäĄýáĽ

Scheduler Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ÝöäŰíťýáŁÝŐŞ ýâŁýä▒

ýĽäŰ×śŰą╝ ý░Şŕ│áÝĽśýŚČ File(SAM) / DB ÝâÇý×ůýŁś Scheduler Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ÝöäŰíťýáŁÝŐŞ Űą╝ ýâŁýä▒ÝĽťŰőĄ.

  1. File(SAM)ÝâÇý×ů
  2. DBÝâÇý×ů

Scheduler Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýáäý▓┤ ýäĄýáĽ

Scheduler Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ context-scheduler.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö Scheduler Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýőĄÝľëýŚÉ ÝĽäýÜöÝĽť xml ýáĽŰ│┤ýÖÇ SchedulerýŁś Trigger ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.
Ôťö TriggerýŚÉ jobDetail(JobDetailBean)ŕ│╝ cronExpressionŰą╝ ýäĄýáĽÝĽťŰőĄ. ŕŞ░Ű│Şýáüýť╝Űíť ŰžĄ 10ý┤ł ýú╝ŕŞ░Űíť jobDetailýŁä ýőĄÝľëÝĽśŰĆäŰíŁ ýäĄýáĽŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.
Ôťö ŰőĄŰąŞ TriggerýŁś ýéČýÜęŰ░ęŰ▓ĽýŁä ýĽîŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽ┤ýäťŰŐö Scheduling ýäťŰ╣äýŐĄ Űą╝ ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.

    <import resource="context-batch-datasource.xml" />
	<import resource="context-batch-job-launcher.xml" />
	<import resource="context-batch-sqlmap.xml"/>
 
	<bean class="org.springframework.scheduling.quartz.SchedulerFactoryBean">
		<property name="triggers">
			<bean id="cronTrigger" class="org.springframework.scheduling.quartz.CronTriggerBean">
				<property name="jobDetail" ref="jobDetail" />
				<property name="cronExpression" value="0/10 * * * * ?" />
			</bean>
		</property>
	</bean>

Scheduler Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ context-scheduler-job.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö context-scheduler.xmlýŚÉýäť ýéČýÜęÝĽť jobDetailýŁś Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄ(EgovJobLauncherDetails) ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.
Ôťö jobDetailýŁś jobDataAsMapýŚÉ ÝĽäýłśýáüýť╝Űíť jobName, jobLocator, jobLauncher Űô▒ýŁś ýäŞŕ░ÇýžÇ ýáĽŰ│┤Űą╝ ŕŞ░ýłáÝĽťŰőĄ.
Ôťö ýťäýŚÉ ŕŞ░ýłáÝĽť ýäŞŕ░ÇýžÇ ýáĽŰ│┤ ýÖŞýŚÉ jobDataAsMapýŚÉ ŕŞ░ýłáÝĽśŰŐö ŕ░ĺýŁÇ Job ParameterŰą╝ ýâŁýä▒ÝĽśŰŐöŰŹ░ ýŁ┤ýÜęŰÉťŰőĄ.

ýśł) Input File ŕ▓ŻŰíť , Output File ŕ▓ŻŰíť

    <bean id="jobDetail" class="org.springframework.scheduling.quartz.JobDetailBean">
		<property name="jobClass" value="egovframework.brte.sample.scheduler.support.EgovJobLauncherDetails" />
		<property name="group" value="quartz-batch" />
		<property name="jobDataAsMap">
			<map>
				<entry key="jobName" value="fixedToIbatisJob"/>
				<entry key="jobLocator" value-ref="jobRegistry"/>
				<entry key="jobLauncher" value-ref="jobLauncher"/>
				<entry key="inputFile" value="classpath:/egovframework/batch/data/inputs/txtData.txt"/>
				<entry key="outputFile" value="file:./src/main/resources/egovframework/batch/data/outputs/txtOutput.txt"/>
			</map>
		</property>
	</bean>

Scheduler Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ context-batch-datasource.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö datasource ŕ┤ÇŰáĘ ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.

    <bean id="egov.propertyConfigurer" class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.PropertyPlaceholderConfigurer">
        <property name="locations">
            <list>
                <value>classpath:/egovframework/batch/properties/globals.properties</value>
            </list>
        </property>
    </bean>
 
	...
	DBMSŰ│ä ýäĄýáĽ
         ...
    <bean id="transactionManager" class="org.springframework.jdbc.datasource.DataSourceTransactionManager" lazy-init="true">
		<property name="dataSource" ref="egov.dataSource" />
	</bean>
 
	<bean id="lobHandler" class="org.springframework.jdbc.support.lob.DefaultLobHandler"/>
 
	<bean id="customEditorConfigurer" class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.CustomEditorConfigurer">
		<property name="customEditors">
			<map>
				<entry key="int[]" value="org.springframework.batch.support.IntArrayPropertyEditor" />

		</property>
	</bean>

Scheduler Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ context-batch-job-launcher.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö JobLauncher, JobOperator, JobRepository, JobRegistry, JobExplorer ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.

    <bean id="jobLauncher"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.launch.support.SimpleJobLauncher">
		<property name="jobRepository" ref="jobRepository" />
	</bean>
 
	<bean class="org.springframework.batch.core.configuration.support.JobRegistryBeanPostProcessor">
		<property name="jobRegistry" ref="jobRegistry"/>
	</bean>
 
	<bean id="jobRepository"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.repository.support.JobRepositoryFactoryBean"
		p:dataSource-ref="egov.dataSource" p:transactionManager-ref="transactionManager" p:lobHandler-ref="lobHandler"/>
 
	<bean id="jobOperator"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.launch.support.SimpleJobOperator"
		p:jobLauncher-ref="jobLauncher" p:jobExplorer-ref="jobExplorer"
		p:jobRepository-ref="jobRepository" p:jobRegistry-ref="jobRegistry" />
 
	<bean id="jobExplorer"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.explore.support.JobExplorerFactoryBean"
		p:dataSource-ref="egov.dataSource" />
 
	<bean id="jobRegistry"
		class="org.springframework.batch.core.configuration.support.MapJobRegistry" />

Scheduler Ű░░ý╣ś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐ ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ context-batch-sqlmap.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö SQLMapClient ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ.

    <bean id="sqlMapClient" class="org.springframework.orm.ibatis.SqlMapClientFactoryBean">
		<property name="dataSource" ref="egov.dataSource" />
		<property name="configLocation" value="classpath:/egovframework/sqlmap/brte/sql-map-config.xml" />	
	</bean>

EgovSchedulerJobRunner ŕÁČýä▒ Ű░Ć ýłśÝľë

EgovSchedulerJobRunner ŕÁČýä▒

EgovSchedulerJobRunnerýŁś main() ŰęöýćîŰôťýŚÉýäť SchedulerýŁś jobDetail Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄ(EgovJobLauncherDetails)Űą╝ ýőĄÝľëÝĽśŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽť ýłťýäťŰŐö ýĽäŰ×śýÖÇ ŕ░ÖŰőĄ.

  1. ýőĄÝľëÝĽá JobýŁ┤ ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉť xml ÝîîýŁ╝ ŕ▓ŻŰíťŰą╝ jobPaths Ű│ÇýłśýŚÉ ýžÇýáĽÝĽťŰőĄ.
  2. Scheduler ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉť xmlÝîîýŁ╝(context-scheduler.xml)ýŁś ŕ▓ŻŰíť, jobDetail Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄŕ░Ç ýáĽýŁśŰÉť xml ÝîîýŁ╝(context-scheduler-job.xml)ýŁś ŕ▓ŻŰíť, jobPaths ŕĚŞŰŽČŕ│á ýžÇýŚ░ýőťŕ░ä(ŕŞ░Ű│Ş: 30ý┤ł)ýŁä ýžÇýáĽÝĽťŰőĄ.
  3. start() ŰęöýćîŰôťŰą╝ ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽśýŚČ SchedulerŰą╝ ýőĄÝľëÝĽťŰőĄ.
	public static void main(String[] args) {
 
		List<String> jobPaths = new ArrayList<String>();
 
		/*
		 * 1. SAM ýőĄÝľë ýśłýáť(File To File)ýŚÉýäť ýéČýÜę ÝĽá Batch JobýŁ┤ ŕŞ░ýłá ŰÉť xmlÝîîýŁ╝ ŕ▓ŻŰíťŰôĄ((jobPaths)
		 */
		jobPaths.add("/egovframework/batch/job/delimitedToDelimitedJob.xml");
		jobPaths.add("/egovframework/batch/job/fixedToFixedJob.xml");
 
		/*
		 * 2. SAM ýőĄÝľë ýśłýáť(File To DB)ýŚÉýäť ýéČýÜę ÝĽá Batch JobýŁ┤ ŕŞ░ýłá ŰÉť xmlÝîîýŁ╝ ŕ▓ŻŰíťŰôĄ((jobPaths)
		 */
		jobPaths.add("/egovframework/batch/job/fixedToIbatisJob.xml");
		jobPaths.add("/egovframework/batch/job/fixedToJdbcJob.xml");
 
		/*
		 * EgovSchedulerRunnerýŚÉ contextPath, schedulerJobPath, jobPathsŰą╝ ýŁŞýłśŰíť Űäśŕ▓Ęýäť ýőĄÝľëÝĽťŰőĄ.
		 * contextPath: Batch Job ýőĄÝľëýŚÉ ÝĽäýÜöÝĽť context ýáĽŰ│┤ŕ░Ç ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉť xmlÝîîýŁ╝ ŕ▓ŻŰíť
		 * schedulerJobPath: SchedulerýŁś Triggerŕ░Ç ýłśÝľëÝĽá SchedulerJob(ex: QuartzJob)ýŁ┤ ŕŞ░ýłáŰÉť xmlÝîîýŁ╝ ŕ▓ŻŰíť
		 * jobPaths: Batch JobýŁ┤ ŕŞ░ýłá ŰÉť xml ÝîîýŁ╝ ŕ▓ŻŰíťŰôĄ
		 * delayTime: Scheduler ýőĄÝľëýŁä ýťäÝĽ┤ ApplicationContextŰą╝ ýóůŰúîŰą╝ ýžÇýŚ░ýőťÝéĄŰŐö ýőťŕ░ä(ýőĄÝľëýőťŕ░ä)
		 *            (ŕŞ░Ű│Ş 30000 milliseconds: 30ý┤ł) 
		 */
		EgovSchedulerRunner egovSchedulerRunner = new EgovSchedulerRunner(
				"/egovframework/batch/context-batch-scheduler.xml",
				"/egovframework/batch/context-scheduler-job.xml",					
				jobPaths, 30000);	
		egovSchedulerRunner.start();
	}

ýőĄÝľëŰÉť SchedulerŰŐö context-scheduler.xmlýŚÉýäť ýäĄýáĽÝĽť ýú╝ŕŞ░, ýőťŕ░äýŚÉ Űž×ýÂöýľ┤ jobDetail Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄ(EgovJobLauncherDetails)ýŁś executeInternal() ŰęöýćîŰôťŰą╝ ÝśŞýÂťÝĽťŰőĄ. ŰęöýćîŰôť Űé┤ýŁś ŰĆÖý×ĹýŁÇ ýĽäŰ×śýÖÇ ŕ░ÖŰőĄ.

  1. jobDataMapýŚÉýäť jobName, jobParameters(jobDataMapýŚÉ ýäĄýáĽŰÉť keyýĄĹ jobName, jobLocator, jobLauncherŰą╝ ýáťýÖŞÝĽť ŰéśŰĘŞýžÇ)Űą╝ ŰÂäŰŽČÝĽťŰőĄ.
  2. ýú╝ŕŞ░ýáüýť╝Űíť ýőĄÝľëŰÉśŰŐö JobýŁś Job Parameter ýťáýŁ╝ýä▒ýŁä Ű│┤ý×ąÝĽśŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽ┤ Job ParameterýŁś timestamp ŕ░ĺýŁä ŕ░▒ýőáÝĽťŰőĄ.
  3. jobLauncherŰą╝ ÝćÁÝĽ┤ JobýŁä ýőĄÝľëÝĽťŰőĄ.
	@SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
	protected void executeInternal(JobExecutionContext context) {
		Long timestamp = null;
		Map<String, Object> jobDataMap = context.getMergedJobDataMap();
		String jobName = (String) jobDataMap.get(JOB_NAME);
 
		/* 
		 * ýú╝ŕŞ░ýáüýť╝Űíť ýőĄÝľëŕ░ÇŰŐąÝĽśŰĆäŰíŁ ÝĽśŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽ┤, JobParamterýŁś timestamp ŕ░ĺýŁä ŕ░▒ýőáÝĽťŰőĄ. 
		 */
		if(jobDataMap.containsKey("timestamp")) {
			jobDataMap.remove("timestamp");
		}
		timestamp = new Date().getTime();
		jobDataMap.put("timestamp", timestamp);
 
		log.warn("Quartz trigger firing with Spring Batch jobName="+jobName);
 
		JobParameters jobParameters = getJobParametersFromJobMap(jobDataMap);
		try {
			jobLauncher.run(jobLocator.getJob(jobName), jobParameters);
		}
		catch (JobExecutionException e) {
			log.error("Could not execute job.", e);
		}
	}

EgovSchedulerJobRunner ýłśÝľë

ŰęöŰë┤ ÝĹťýőťýĄäýŚÉýäť Run > Run ýŁä ýäáÝâŁÝĽťŰőĄ.

ŕ▓░ŕ│╝ ÝÖĽýŁŞ

Console ý░ŻýŚÉýäť Schedulerŕ░Ç ýâŁýä▒ŰÉśýŚłŕ│á, SchedulerýŁś ýőĄÝľë ýőťŕ░äýŁ┤ 30ý┤ł ý×äýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

Schedulerŕ░Ç ŰžĄ 10ý┤ł ŕ░äŕ▓ęýť╝Űíť jobDetailýŁä ýőĄÝľëÝĽśýŚČ, Spring Ű░░ý╣ś JobýŁ┤ ýőĄÝľëŰÉśýŚłýŁîýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

11ýőť 6ŰÂä 50ý┤ł

11ýőť 7ŰÂä 00ý┤łý┤ł

11ýőť 7ŰÂä 10ý┤ł

49 -

JobRegistry

ŕ░ťýÜö

JobRegistryŰŐö ýâŁýä▒ŰÉť JobýŁä ý×ÉŰĆÖýť╝Űíť MapÝśĽÝâťŰíť ýáÇý×ąÝĽśýŚČ ŕ┤ÇŰŽČ(ýÂöŕ░Ç, ýéşýáť Űô▒)ÝĽťŰőĄ.

ýäĄŰ¬ů

JobRegistryŰŐö ÝĽäýłśŰŐö ýĽäŰőłýžÇŰžî contextýŚÉýäť JobýŁä ýÂöýáüÝĽśŕ▒░Űéś ŰőĄŰąŞ ŕ││ýŚÉýäť ýâŁýä▒ŰÉť JobýŁä application contextýŁś ýĄĹýĽÖýŚÉ Ű¬ĘýŁä ŰĽî ýťáýÜęÝĽśŰőĄ. Űô▒ŰíŁŰÉť JobýŁś ýŁ┤ŰŽäŕ│╝ ýćŹýä▒ŰôĄýŁä ýí░ý×ĹÝĽá ýłś ý×łýť╝Űę░ job nameŕ│╝ job instanceýŁś MapýŁś ÝśĽÝâťŰíť ýŁ┤ŰúĘýŤîýáŞ ý×łŰőĄ.

<bean id="jobRegistry" class="org.springframework.batch.core.configuration.support.MapJobRegistry" />

JobRegistryýŚÉ JobýŁä ý×ÉŰĆÖýť╝Űíť Űô▒ŰíŁÝĽśŰŐö Ű░ęŰ▓ĽýŁÇ ŰĹÉ ŕ░ÇýžÇŕ░Ç ý×łŰőĄ.

  • JobRegistryBeanPostProcessor ýéČýÜę
  • AutomaticJobRegistrar ýéČýÜę

JobRegistryBeanPostProcessor

ýŁ┤ŕ▓âýŁÇ Bean post-processorýť╝Űíť Application Contextŕ░Ç ýśČŰŁ╝ŕ░ÇŰę┤ýäť bean Űô▒ŰíŁ ýőť, ý×ÉŰĆÖýť╝Űíť JobRegistryýŚÉ JobýŁä Űô▒ŰíŁ ýőťý╝ťýĄÇŰőĄ.

<bean id="jobRegistryBeanPostProcessor" class="org.springframework.batch.core.configuration.support.JobRegistryBeanPostProcessor">
    <property name="jobRegistry" ref="jobRegistry"/>
</bean>

AutomaticJobRegistrar

ŰÂÇŰ¬Ę contextýŚÉýäť ý×ÉýőŁ contextsýŚÉ ýâŁýä▒ŰÉť JobŰôĄýŁä ýéČýÜęÝĽśŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽ┤ ý×ÉŰĆÖýť╝Űíť ŰÂÇŰ¬Ę contextýŁś JobRegistryýŚÉ JobŰôĄýŁä Űô▒ŰíŁýőťÝéĘŰőĄ. AutomaticJobRegistrarýŁä ýéČýÜęÝĽśŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽ┤ýäťŰŐö ýĽäŰ×śýÖÇ ŕ░ÖýŁ┤ ApplicationContextFactoryýÖÇ JobLoaderýŁś ýäĄýáĽýŁÇ ÝĽäýłśýŁ┤ŰőĄ. ApplicationContextFactoryŰŐö ClassPathXmlApplicationContextFactoryŰą╝ ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽśýŚČ ý×ÉýőŁ contextŰą╝ ýâŁýä▒ÝĽśŕ│á JobLoaderŰŐö ý×ÉýőŁ contextŰą╝ ŕ┤ÇŰŽČÝĽśŕ│á JobRegistryýŚÉ Job Űô▒ŰíŁýŁä ÝĽťŰőĄ.

<bean class="org.spr...AutomaticJobRegistrar">
   <property name="applicationContextFactories">
      <bean class="org.spr...ClasspathXmlApplicationContextsFactoryBean">
         <property name="resources" value="classpath*:/config/job*.xml" />
      </bean>
   </property>
   <property name="jobLoader">
      <bean class="org.spr...DefaultJobLoader">
         <property name="jobRegistry" ref="jobRegistry" />
      </bean>
   </property>
</bean>

ý░Şŕ│áý×ÉŰúî

  • http://static.springsource.org/spring-batch/reference/html/configureJob.html#d0e2232

50 -

SQLite

ŕ░ťýÜö

Ű░░ý╣ś ý▓śŰŽČýőť ŕ▓ŻŰčëÝÖöŰÉť RepositoryŰą╝ ýéČýÜęýŁä ýťäÝĽť SQLite ý▓śŰŽČŰą╝ ýžÇýŤÉÝĽťŰőĄ.

ýäĄŰ¬ů

SQLite pom.xml ýäĄýáĽ

sqlite ŰŁ╝ýŁ┤ŰŞîŰčČŰŽČ ýéČýÜęýŁä ýťäÝĽ┤ dependencyŰą╝ ýÂöŕ░Ç ÝĽťŰőĄ.

<dependency>
	<groupId>org.xerial</groupId>
	<artifactId>sqlite-jdbc</artifactId>
	<version>x.x.x</version>
</dependency>

SQLite ýéČýÜę

SQLite ýéČýÜęýŁä ýťäÝĽ┤ ŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░Ű▓áýŁ┤ýŐĄ ýäĄýáĽýŁä ÝĽśŕ│á repository ýâŁýä▒ýŁä ýťäÝĽť ŕŞ░ý┤łŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░Űą╝ ýäĄýáĽ ÝĽťŰőĄ.

<!-- SQLite database  ýäĄýáĽ -->
<bean id="dataSource" class="org.springframework.jdbc.datasource.DriverManagerDataSource">
	<property name="driverClassName" value="org.sqlite.JDBC" />
	<property name="url" value="jdbc:sqlite:repository.sqlite" />
	<property name="username" value="" />
	<property name="password" value="" />
</bean>

<!-- SQLite ŕŞ░ý┤łŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░ ýäĄýáĽ -->
<jdbc:initialize-database data-source="dataSource">
	<jdbc:script location="org/springframework/batch/core/schema-drop-sqlite.sql" />
	<jdbc:script location="org/springframework/batch/core/schema-sqlite.sql" />
 </jdbc:initialize-database>

51 -

N:1 ÝîîýŁ╝ Partition ýśłýáť

ýäĄŰ¬ů

ýäĄýáĽ

Job ýäĄýáĽ

N:1 Partition ýśłýáťýŁś Job ýäĄýáĽ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁŞ partitionFileToOneFileJob.xmlýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.

  • partitioner : ý×ůŰáąŰŽČýćîýŐĄ ýłś ŰžîÝü╝ Master StepýŁä ÝîîÝő░ýůöŰőŁÝĽśŰŐö MultiResourcePartitioner
  • grid-size : ýâŁýä▒ÝĽá Context ýłś
  • writer : scope=ÔÇťstepÔÇŁ ýäĄýáĽ ÝĽ┤ýžÇŰíť ýŚČŰčČ Slave Step ŰôĄýŁ┤ ŕ│ÁýťáÝĽśŰŐö EgovPartitionFlatFileItemWriter ýéČýÜę(ÝâÇŕ▓čÝîîýŁ╝ýŁ┤ ÝĽśŰéśýŁ┤Ű»ÇŰíť, ŰőĄŰąŞ ÝîîÝő░ýůöŰőŁŕ│╝ ŰőČŰŽČ ýÂťŰáąýáĽŰ│┤Űą╝ ŰőĄŰúĘŰŐö EgovOutputFileListener ýäĄýáĽýŁ┤ ÝĽäýÜö ýŚćýŁî)

Ôťö ýŁ┤ ýśłýáťŰŐö ýŚČŰčČ Slave Step ŰôĄýŁ┤ ÝĽśŰéśýŁś WriterŰą╝ ŕ│ÁýťáÝĽśŰŐö ŕ│╝ýáĽýŚÉýäť Thread Safe ÝĽśŰĆäŰíŁ ŕÁČýä▒ŰÉśýľ┤ ý×łŰőĄ

<job id="partitionJob" restartable="true" xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/batch">		
	<step id="step">
		<partition step="step1" partitioner="partitioner">
			<handler grid-size="4" task-executor="taskExecutor" />
		</partition>
	</step>
</job>

<bean id="partitioner" class="org.springframework.batch.core.partition.support.MultiResourcePartitioner">
	<property name="resources" value="classpath:egovframework/data/input/delimited*.csv" />
</bean>

<step id="step1" xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/batch">
	<tasklet transaction-manager="transactionManager">
		<chunk writer="itemWriterPartition" reader="itemReader commit-interval="3" />
	</tasklet>
</step>

<bean id="itemReader" scope="step" autowire-candidate="false" parent="itemReaderParent">
	<property name="resource" value="#{stepExecutionContext[fileName]}" />
</bean>
<bean id="itemWriterPartition" class="egovframework.brte.sample.example.support.EgovPartitionFlatFileItemWriter">
	<property name="resource" value="file:./target/test-outputs/partition/file/delimitedOneFile.csv" />
	...
</bean>

Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄ ýäĄýáĽ

MultiResourcePartitioner

ýŐĄÝöäŰžüýŚÉýäť ýáťŕ│ÁÝĽśŰŐö MultiResourcePartitioner Űą╝ ýéČýÜęÝĽśŰę░ ý×ůŰáąŰŽČýćîýŐĄýŁś ýłś(ý×ůŰáąÝîîýŁ╝ ýłś)ŰžîÝü╝ ContextŰą╝ ýâŁýä▒ÝĽśŕ│á ýÂťŰáąýťäý╣śŰą╝ ýůőÝîůÝĽśŰŐö ýŚşÝĽáýŁä ÝĽťŰőĄ.(Context ýâŁýä▒ýť╝Űíť ýŚČŰčČ Slave StepŰôĄýŁä ýéČýÜęÝĽá ýłś ý×łŕ▓î ŰÉĘ)

Ôťö ýŁ┤ ýśłýáťýŚÉýäť ŰŐö File ÝîîÝő░ýůöŰőŁ ýśłýáťýŚÉýäť ýéČýÜęÝĽśŰŐö MultiResourcePartitionerýÖÇ ŰĆÖýŁ╝ÝĽśŰ»ÇŰíť ÝĽ┤Űő╣ŰÂÇŰÂäýŁä ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.

EgovOutputFileListener

Step ýłśÝľë ýŁ┤ýáäýŚÉ ÝśŞýÂťýŁ┤ ŰÉśŰę░, ý×ůŰáąŰŽČýćîýŐĄýŁś ýáĽŰ│┤Űą╝ ýŁ┤ýÜęÝĽśýŚČ ýÂťŰáąÝîîýŁ╝ýŚÉ ŰîÇÝĽť ýáĽŰ│┤Űą╝ ýâŁýä▒ Ű░Ć ýáÇý×ąÝĽťŰőĄ.

Ôťö ýÂťŰáąýŁÇ pathýŁś ŕŞ░Ű│Şŕ░ĺýŁŞ ÔÇťfile:./target/output/ÔÇŁ ýŁ┤ÝĽśýŚÉ ýâŁýä▒ýŁ┤ ŰÉśŰę░, ýŁ┤ ŕ▓ŻŰíťŰŐö Job ýäĄýáĽÝîîýŁ╝(path ÝöäŰíťÝŹ╝Ýő░)ýŚÉýäť Ű│Çŕ▓ŻÝĽá ýłś ý×łŰőĄ.

JunitTest ŕÁČýä▒ Ű░Ć ýłśÝľë

JunitTest ŕÁČýä▒

partitionFileToOneFileJob ýäĄýáĽŕ│╝ ŕ┤ÇŰáĘ Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄŰôĄŰíť Junit TestŰą╝ ýłśÝľëÝĽťŰőĄ. ýŁ┤ ŰĽî Ű░░ý╣śŕ░Ç ýłśÝľëŰÉśŕ│á, ŕ┤ÇŰáĘŰÉť Űé┤ýÜęýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽá ýłś ý×łŰőĄ.

Ôťö JunitTest Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄýŁś ŕÁČýí░ŰŐö Ű░░ý╣śýőĄÝľëÝÖśŕ▓Ż ýśłýáť Junit Test ýäĄŰ¬ůýŁä ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.
Ôťö assertEquals(ÔÇťCOMPLETEDÔÇŁ, jobExecution.getExitStatus().getExitCode()) : Ű░░ý╣śýłśÝľëŕ▓░ŕ│╝ŕ░Ç COMPLETED ýŁŞýžÇ ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ.
Ôťö ŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░ý▓śŰŽČ ŕ▓░ŕ│╝Űą╝ ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽśŕŞ░ ýťäÝĽ┤, Ű░░ý╣śýłśÝľëŕ│╝ ŕ░ťŰ│äýáüýť╝Űíť ýŚČŰčČ ý×ůŰáąÝîîýŁ╝ýŁś ŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░ ÝĽęŕ│╝ ŰőĘýŁ╝ ýÂťŰáąÝîîýŁ╝ýŁś ŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░ ÝĽęýŁä Ű╣äŕÁÉÝĽśýŚČ ýáĽýâüýłśÝľëýŚČŰÂÇŰą╝ ÝîÉŰőĘÝĽťŰőĄ.

@Test
public void testUpdateCredit() throws Exception {
	...
	open(inputReader);
	List<CustomerCredit> inputs = new ArrayList<CustomerCredit>(getCredits(inputReader));
	close(inputReader);
 
	JobExecution jobExecution = jobLauncherTestUtils.launchJob();
	assertEquals(BatchStatus.COMPLETED, jobExecution.getStatus());
 
	@SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
	ItemReader<CustomerCredit> outputReader = (ItemReader<CustomerCredit>) applicationContext.getBean("outputTestReader");
	open(outputReader);
	List<CustomerCredit> outputs = new ArrayList<CustomerCredit>(getCredits(outputReader));
	close(outputReader);
 
	// inputFile ŕ│╝ outputFile ýŚÉ ÝĆČÝĽĘŰÉť line ýłś Ű╣äŕÁÉ
	assertEquals(inputs.size(), outputs.size());
	// inputFile ŕ│╝ outputFile ýŚÉ ÝĆČÝĽĘŰÉť Ű¬ĘŰôá credit ýŁś ÝĽęýŁä Ű╣äŕÁÉ
	int inputCredit=0;
	int outputCredit=0;
 
	//input ÝîîýŁ╝ŰôĄýŚÉýäť Credit ýŁś ÝĽę
	inputs.iterator();
	for (int i = 0; i < inputs.size(); i++) {
		inputCredit += inputs.get(i).getCredit().intValue();
	}
 
	//output ÝîîýŁ╝ŰôĄýŚÉýäť Credit ýŁś ÝĽę
	for (int j = 0; j <  outputs.size(); j++) {
		outputCredit += outputs.get(j).getCredit().intValue();
	}
 
	assertEquals(inputCredit, outputCredit);
}

JunitTest ýłśÝľë

ýłśÝľëŰ░ęŰ▓ĽýŁÇ JunitTest ýőĄÝľëýŁä ý░Şŕ│áÝĽťŰőĄ.

ŕ▓░ŕ│╝ÝÖĽýŁŞ

ýâŁýä▒ŰÉť ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁś ŕ▓░ŕ│╝Űą╝ ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽťŰőĄ. Ű░░ý╣ś ýłśÝľë ŕ▓░ŕ│╝, ýäŞŕ░ťýŁś ý×ůŰáąÝîîýŁ╝ýŁä ýŁŻŕ│á ý▓śŰŽČÝĽśýŚČ ÝĽśŰéśýŁś ÝîîýŁ╝ýŚÉ ýô░ýŚČýžä ŕ▓âýŁä ÝÖĽýŁŞÝĽá ýłś ý×łŰőĄ.

52 -

Logback logging

ŕ░ťýÜö

Ű░░ý╣ś ý▓śŰŽČýőť Űíťŕ╣ů ý▓śŰŽČŰą╝ ýťäÝĽ┤ log4j2Űą╝ ýžÇýŤÉÝĽśŕ│á ý×łýžÇŰžî ŕ▓ŻŰčëÝÖöŰÉť Űíťŕ╣ů ý▓śŰŽČŰą╝ ýťäÝĽ┤ Logback Űíťŕ╣ů ý▓śŰŽČŰą╝ ýžÇýŤÉÝĽťŰőĄ

ýäĄŰ¬ů

Logback pom.xml ýäĄýáĽ

log4j, commons-logging ŕ┤ÇŰáĘ ŰŁ╝ýŁ┤ŰŞîŰčČŰŽČŰą╝ exclusion ý▓śŰŽČÝĽśŕ│á, Logback ŰŁ╝ýŁ┤ŰŞîŰčČŰŽČŰą╝ Űô▒ŰíŁÝĽťŰőĄ.

<!-- log4j ŕ┤ÇŰáĘ exclusion -->
<dependency>
	<groupId>egovframework.rte</groupId>
	<artifactId>egovframework.rte.bat.core</artifactId>
	<version>${egovframework.rte.version}</version>
	<exclusions>
		<exclusion>
			<artifactId>log4j-core</artifactId>
			<groupId>org.apache.logging.log4j</groupId>
		</exclusion>
		<exclusion>
			<artifactId>log4j-slf4j-impl</artifactId>
			<groupId>org.apache.logging.log4j</groupId>
		</exclusion>
		<exclusion>
			<artifactId>log4j-over-slf4j</artifactId>
			<groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
		</exclusion>
		<exclusion>
			<artifactId>commons-logging</artifactId>
			<groupId>commons-logging</groupId>
		</exclusion>
	</exclusions>
</dependency>
 
<!-- commons-logging ŕ┤ÇŰáĘ exclusion -->
<exclusion>
	<artifactId>commons-logging</artifactId>
	<groupId>commons-logging</groupId>
</exclusion>
 
<!-- logback ŕ┤ÇŰáĘ ŰŁ╝ýŁ┤ŰŞîŰčČŰŽČ Űô▒ŰíŁ -->
<dependency>
	<groupId>ch.qos.logback</groupId>
	<artifactId>logback-core</artifactId>
	<version>1.1.7</version>
</dependency>
<dependency>
	<groupId>ch.qos.logback</groupId>
	<artifactId>logback-classic</artifactId>
	<version>1.1.7</version>
</dependency>
<dependency>
  <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
  <artifactId>jcl-over-slf4j</artifactId>
  <version>1.7.21</version>
</dependency>

SQLite ýéČýÜę

logback ýéČýÜęýŁä ýťäÝĽ┤ logback.xmlŰą╝ ýäĄýáĽýŁ┤ ýäáÝľë ŰÉśýľ┤ýĽ╝ ÝĽťŰőĄ. ýäĄýáĽŕ┤ÇŰáĘ ý×ÉýäŞÝĽť ýéČÝĽşýŁä ýĽäŰ×ś ŰžüÝüČ ý░Şŕ│á

  • logback
<!-- ýäĄýáĽ ýśłýőť -->
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration>
	<appender name="STDOUT" class="ch.qos.logback.core.ConsoleAppender">
		<encoder>
			<pattern>[logback]%d{HH:mm:ss.SSS} [%thread] %-5level %logger{36} - %msg%n</pattern>
		</encoder>
	</appender>
	<logger name="java.sql" level="DEBUG" />
	<logger name="egovframework" level="DEBUG" />
	<logger name="jdbc.sqltiming" level="DEBUG" />
	<logger name="org.springframework" level="DEBUG" />
	<root level="DEBUG">
		<appender-ref ref="STDOUT" />
	</root>
</configuration>

ý░Şŕ│áý×ÉŰúî
